perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman in a brown puffer jacket stands in a warehouse-style store aisle, holding a small silver portable heater. She looks at the camera and gestures towards the product. (2) The camera zooms in on the side of the heater where a gas canister would be inserted, and the woman points to it with her right hand. (3) The shot shifts to a stack of red boxes featuring a yellow rabbit character; an off-camera hand points at them. (4) The woman leans her elbow against a stack of boxes and looks directly at the camera while speaking, with a relaxed and smiling expression.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo background music begins. A female voice speaks with high energy and a friendly tone, introducing the product. (2) A male voice joins the conversation, sounding skeptical and humorous; they both laugh as they discuss the item. (3) Occasional 'popping' or 'boing' sound effects are used to highlight specific jokes or text overlays.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '究竟誰會買這個 拜託留言告訴我' (Who would buy this, please leave a comment and tell me), '可攜式不鏽鋼暖爐 1,999元' (Portable stainless steel heater 1,999 yuan). (2) Decorative Text: 'Costco Wholesale' logo at the top throughout the video. (3) Decorative Text: '烤麵包機' (Toaster) appears as a variety-show style tag near the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Close-up -> Price Comparison -> Opinion/Discussion

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character on-screen, 1 male hand/voice interacting from off-camera.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown puffer jacket with a fur hood and a white patterned skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A Costco warehouse aisle with high metal shelving units stacked with boxes of household goods and electronics.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a lighthearted and critical review of a niche camping product found at Costco, questioning its value and practicality compared to cheaper alternatives for the average consumer.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The tone is critical and questioning of the product's value, suggesting it is an organic shopping vlog.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-density variety-show style text overlays and rapid interaction between on-screen talent and the camera operator.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets Costco shoppers and camping enthusiasts in Taiwan, using humor and price comparisons to drive engagement.
